exercises.name: Slider Lunge
exercises.description:
1.When performing this exercise, keep your core engaged. You’ll want to have your legs hit 90 degrees at the bottom of the lunge.
 
2.Ensure that the front knee doesn’t go over top of the toes.

3.Stand on the sliders then slide one leg backwards until your knee nearly touches the ground while making sure the other leg hit 90 degrees. While doing this, keep a straight body. 

4.Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions. 

5.When you complete one side, repeat on the other.

exercises.name: Slider Lunge with Medicine Ball Overhead Press
exercises.description:
1.When performing this exercise, you’ll wanna keep your core engaged particularly when your arm is locked out overhead.

2.You’ll also want your bicep to your ear while you’re in the overhead position.

3.As far as the bottom of the lunge, you’ll wanna ensure that your front knee doesn’t project over top of your front foot toes.

4.With the ball in your hands, stand on the sliders. This will be the starting position.

5.Work on the lunge. Holding the ball in front of your body, just above the chest, slide one leg backwards until your knee nearly touches the ground while making sure the other leg hit 90 degrees. 

6.Pull yourself up to starting position. Then raise the ball overhead keeping your biceps to your ear. Then back to starting position.

7.Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions. 

8.When you complete one side, repeat on the other.

exercises.name: Slider Mountain Climbers
exercises.description:
1.When performing this exercise, maintain a neutral spine by keeping your abdominals on and set throughout the exercise. 

2.With your feet on the sliders begin in the exercise with your arms extended on the ground to support the body, back and neck in a straight line, and core tight.

3.Alternately pull your legs towards your chest while keeping your arms steady on the ground and your back straight.

4.Repeat for the recommended number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Slider Pike
exercises.description:
1.When performing this exercise, keep your abdominals engaged and neutral spine throughout.

2.It helps if you shorten the distance slightly between the bottom of your ribs and the top of your hips.

3.With your feet on the sliders, get into starting position by balancing your weight on your hands, arms and elbows straight while keeping a straight body.

4.Pull your legs towards your chest with your knees straight. Push your hips all the way up. Then back to starting position. 

5.Repeat for the recommended number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Slider Pike and Push Up
exercises.description:
1.When performing this exercise, keep your abdominals engaged throughout.

2.On the push up, try to keep your elbow and hands in line with your chest.

3.With your feet on the sliders, begin in the "up" position of a push-up: arms extended, back and neck in a straight line, and core tight. This will be your starting position. 

4.Pull your legs towards your chest with your knees straight. Push your hips all the way up. Then back to starting position.

5.Descend into the bottom position of the push-up by flexing at the elbows until they reach a 90-degree position.  Then back to starting position.

6.Repeat for the recommended number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Slider Pike and Push Up from Knee
exercises.description:
1.When performing this exercise, keep your abdominals engaged. 

2.When you do your pushups from your knees, ensure a straight line from knee to head.
 
3.With your feet on the sliders, begin in the exercise with your knees on the ground while balancing your weight on your hands, arms and elbows straight

4. Descend into the bottom position of the push-up by flexing at the elbows until they reach a 90-degree position. 

5.Lift your body up along with your knees then pull your legs towards your chest while keeping your knees straight. Push your hips all the way up. Then back to starting position.

6.Repeat for the recommended number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Slider Pike from Elbow
exercises.description:
1.When performing this exercise, you wanna maintain neutral spine throughout.

2.You’ll bend at your hip flexors as you pull your hips high in to the air.

3.With your feet on the sliders, get into starting position by balancing your weight on your elbows.

4.Keeping your body straight, lift your hips off the floor. 

5.Then, pull your legs towards your chest with your knees straight. Push your hips all the way up. Then back to starting position. 

6.Repeat for the recommended number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Slider Push Up
exercises.description:
1.When performing this exercise, ensure that you maintain an active core so keep your abdominals on and glutes strong. 

2.Begin the "up" position of a push-up, with your palms flat on the slider, arms extended, back and neck in a straight line, and core tight. This will be your starting position. 

3.Descend into the bottom position of the push-up by flexing at one elbow until it reaches a 90-degree position while extending the other arm sideways.  Then back to starting position and do on the other arm.

4.Repeat for the recommended number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Slider Rotational Squat
exercises.description: Place sliders under your feet and squat down, rotating your torso toward one side as you push back to standing.

exercises.name: Slider Side Lunge
exercises.description:
1.When performing this exercise, ensure that your abdominals are on. You wanna sit your hips back rather than having the knee come in front of your toes.

3. Stand on the sliders to begin the exercise.

4.Slide one leg side wards, knees straight and making sure the other leg hit 90 degrees. 

5.Pull yourself up to starting position. 

6.Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions. 

7.When you complete one side, then repeat on the other.

exercises.name: Slider Side Lunge with Medicine Ball Reach
exercises.alternateName: slider lateral lunge with medicine ball push
exercises.description:
1.When performing this exercise, you’ll wanna keep your core engaged as you reach the ball in front of you.

2.When you do your side lunge, sit your hips back rather than having the knee project over top of your toes. 

3.Holding the ball in front of your body just above the chest. stand on the sliders. This will be the starting position.

4.Work on the lunge. Extend your arms forward while sliding one leg side wards and making sure the other leg hit 90 degrees. 

5.Pull yourself up to starting position. 

6.Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions. 

7.When you do one side, do the other.

exercises.name: Slider Single Leg Hamstring Curl
exercises.description:
1.When performing this exercise, bridge up by activating your glutes and keeping your abdominals set.

2.Then, do the hamstring curl with one leg. 

3.You can increase the difficulty by pushing into the slider with more pressure.

4.Lie down on the floor and your feet on the slider. Your legs should be bent at the knees then push your hips up. This will be your starting position.

5. Slowly extend one knee until it is straight while keeping your hips up. Then back to starting position.

6.Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

7.When you complete one side, repeat on the other side.

exercises.name: Slider Single Leg Tuck
exercises.description:
1.When performing this exercise, keep your abdominals on and set.

2.You can shorten the distance between your ribs and the top of your hips to get them more active as you pull your knee towards your elbow.

3.With your feet on the sliders, arms extended, back and neck in a straight line, and core tight. This will be your starting position. 

4.Pull one knee towards your elbow, then, back to starting position. 

5.Repeat for the recommended number of repetitions.

6.When you’ve completed one side, repeat on the other.

exercises.name: Slider Single Leg Tuck With Band
exercises.description:
1.When performing this exercise, keep your abdominals engaged. You can do so by slightly shortening the distance between the bottom of your ribs and the top of your hips.

2.With your feet on the sliders and feet attached to a band, arms extended, back and neck in a straight line, and core tight. This will be your starting position. 

3.Pull one knee towards your elbow, then, back to starting position. 

4.Repeat for the recommended number of repetitions.

5.When you complete one side, repeat on the other.

exercises.name: Slider Skier
exercises.description:
1.When performing this exercise, try to mimic alternating lunges as best you can. 

2.You’ll wanna stay lighter on the sliders so that they glide quickly as you alternate from left to right foot.

3. Stand on the sliders to begin the exercise. Push left foot back with knees slightly bent. This will be the starting position.

4.Then, push left foot forward as right foot pushes back. 

5.Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

exercises.name: Slider Tuck
exercises.description:
1.When performing this exercise, maintain neutral spine. You’ll also want to pull from your abdominals as best you can. So, shorten the distance between your ribs and the top of your hips as you pull your knees towards your elbows.

2.With your feet on the sliders, arms extended, back and neck in a straight line, and core tight. This will be your starting position. 

3.Pull your knees towards your elbows, your hips will rise upward until your they are higher than your shoulders. Then, back to starting position. 

4.Repeat for the recommended number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Slider Walk Out With Band
exercises.description:
1.When performing this exercise, maintain a neutral spine. Do so by keeping your abdominals and glutes set throughout the exercise.

3.With your feet on the sliders and feet attached to a band, begin in the exercise with your arms extended, back and neck in a straight line, and core tight.

3.Move forward while keeping your arms and body straight. Then move backwards. 

4.Repeat for the recommended number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Slider Wide Mountain Climber
exercises.description:
1.For this exercise, maintain set core. So that means abdominals on and glutes on.  

2.With your feet on the sliders begin in the exercise with your arms extended on the ground to support the body, back and neck in a straight line, and core tight.

3.Alternately bring one knee towards the elbow on the same side of the body. Making sure as you bring up one knee, bring it wide.

4.Repeat for the recommended number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Slow Mountain Climbers
exercises.description: In a plank position, slowly bring one knee towards your chest, then return and alternate legs, maintaining control and engaging the core.

exercises.name: Small Quads? Try This! (SQUAT TIPS)
exercises.description: Small Quads? Try This! (SQUAT TIPS)

exercises.name: Smith Machine Alternating Jump Lunges
exercises.description:
1. Start by resting the bar across your upper back, with your feet together.

2. Step one foot back, planting the toes on the ground behind you.

3. Slowly descend into the hip and knee of the front leg while keeping your body in line with the bar.

4. Press your front foot into the floor, and push yourself up explosively to leave the floor. 

5. Switch your feet, landing in a lunge position on the opposite side. Descend once again and repeat, alternating sides.

exercises.name: Smith Machine Alternating Side Hanging Leg Raise
exercises.description:
1. Start by setting the bar to chest height. Place a bench directly in front of the bar.

2. Hang from the bar by placing it underneath your arms and crossing your hands in front. 

3. Slowly raise your legs up and over the bench while keeping your abdomen tight. Alternate sides, coming up and over the bench each time. 

4. To make this exercise easier, bend your knees.

exercises.name: Smith Machine Back Squat
exercises.description:
1. Start by standing in front of the bar, set to chest height.

2. Rest the bar on your upper back, with hands grasping the bar. 

3. Reach your hips back and slowly descend into a squat. Return to the start position and repeat.

exercises.name: Smith Machine Behind the Neck Shoulder Press
exercises.description:
1. Start seated upright with the bar at shoulder height, resting on your upper back.

2. With your hands on the bar at shoulder-width, press the bar directly up overhead until your arms are straight.

3. Slowly lower the bar back down to the start position and repeat.

exercises.name: Smith Machine Bench Press
exercises.description:
1. Start by lying on a bench, with the bar aligned directly over your chest.

2. Grip the bar slightly wider than shoulder-width, and slowly lower it down to touch your chest.

3. Press the weight directly back up to the starting position and repeat.

exercises.name: Smith Machine Bent Over Row
exercises.description:
1. Start with the bar, set to hip height, in both hands out in front of you. 

2. Reach your hips back, while keeping a long spine position, so that your torso is almost parallel to the floor. 

3. Fully extend your arms, slowly lowering the bar towards the floor. 

4. Pull the bar back towards you, touching your abdomen at the top. Repeat.

exercises.name: Smith Machine Bicep Curl
exercises.description:
1. Start with the bar set to hip height, holding it in both hands in front of you. 

2. Curl the bar up towards your chest, while keeping your elbows locked in position. 

3. Slowly return to the start position. Repeat.

exercises.name: Smith Machine BOSU Bench Press
exercises.description:
1. Start by placing a BOSU ball, dome side up, directly beneath the bar.

2. With your feet planted on the floor, and upper back supported by the ball, grab the bar in your hands

3. Lower the bar down to touch your chest at the bottom, then press it back up until your arms are fully extended. Repeat.

exercises.name: Smith Machine BOSU Deficit Split Squat
exercises.description:
1. Start by placing a BOSU ball, dome side up, on the floor slightly in front of the bar. 

2. Rest the bar on your upper back, and place one foot on on the ball in front of you. Your feet should be roughly shoulder-width apart. 

3. Slowly descend into the hip and knee of the front leg, dropping your back knee towards the floor. 

4. Push yourself back up to the start position.

5. Repeat on the other side.

exercises.name: Smith Machine BOSU Single Arm Chest Press
exercises.description:
1. Start by placing a BOSU ball, dome side up, directly beneath the bar. 

2. With your feet planted on the floor, and upper back supported by the ball, grab the bar in one hand. 

3. Lower the bar down to touch your chest at the bottom, then press it back up until your arm is fully extended.

4. Repeat on the other side.

exercises.name: Smith Machine Bulgarian Split Squats
exercises.description:
1. Start with your rear foot elevated on a bench behind you, with the bar resting on your upper back.

2. Slowly descend into the hip, knee, and ankle of the front leg. 

3. Drive the floor away by pushing your entire front foot into the ground. Return to the start position.

4. Repeat on the other side.

exercises.name: Smith Machine Calf Raise
exercises.description:
1. Start by placing a step, or a plate beneath the bar to stand on. Allow your heels to drop off the back of the step.

2. Rest the bar on your upper back.

3. Slowly lower your body towards the floor while keeping your knees straight, until your heel touches the floor.

4. Push yourself back up and squeeze your calves at the top position. Repeat.

exercises.name: Smith Machine Close Grip Bench Press
exercises.description:
1. Start by lying on a bench, with the bar aligned directly over your chest. 

2. Grip the bar at shoulder-width, and slowly lower down to touch your chest.

3. Press the weight directly back up to the starting position and repeat.

exercises.name: Smith Machine Deadlift
exercises.description:
1. Start by standing in front of the bar, set to hip height, with a shoulder-width stance. Grab the bar with a shoulder-width grip.

2. Reach your hips back, bend your knees, and lower the bar down towards your mid-shin. Always keep a long, flat, spine position during this movement. 

3. Drive your hips forward while keeping your chest up, and stand up tall. Repeat.

exercises.name: Smith Machine Decline Bench Press
exercises.description:
1. Lie on a decline bench with your feet secured and the bar in your hands, directly above your chest.

2. Slowly lower the bar to touch your chest, then press it back up to the start position.

3. Repeat.

exercises.name: Smith Machine Decline Sit Up
exercises.description:
1. Lie on a decline bench with your feet secured and the bar in your hands, above your chest.

2. Lift your upper body completely off the bench, bringing your chest to your knees. 

3. Slowly return to starting position and repeat.

exercises.name: Smith Machine Dips
exercises.description:
1. Start by setting the bar to hip height.

2. Place your feet in front of the bar, bending your knees, and bringing your hands shoulder-width onto the bar.

3. Bend your elbows straight back to descend slowly under control.

4. Push yourself back up to the start position using your arms, and using your legs for as much assistance as you need Repeat.

exercises.name: Smith Machine Flat Side BOSU Squat
exercises.description:
1. Start by placing a BOSU ball, dome side down, directly beneath the bar. 

2. While standing on the ball, with the bar on your back, slowly descend into a squat by reaching your hips back and sitting downwards.

3. While keeping stable, push yourself back up to the start position. Repeat.
